ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cyclists" (
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cyclist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Cyclist's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Cyclist's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Cyclist's date of birth */,
  "category" TEXT /* Cyclist's category (e.g., Cat 4) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cyclists_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team name */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "average_time" TEXT /* Average time taken by the team to complete races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Race name */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the races table */,
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cyclists table */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the cyclist in the race */,
  "overall_place" INTEGER /* Overall place of the cyclist across all races */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the race */,
  "carried_points" TEXT /* Points carried over from previous races or categories */,
  "scored_points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the current race */,
  "race_time_seconds" INTEGER /* Race time in seconds */,
  "gps_data" TEXT /* GPS data for the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_cyclist_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclist_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Role name */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the races table */,
  "cyclist_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cyclists table */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of the cyclist in the race */,
  "elevation_gain" TEXT /* Elevation gain during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_analytics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_analytics_cyclist_id FOREIGN KEY ("cyclist_id") REFERENCES cyclists ("cyclist_id")
)
